Video.summary: It's LADIES NIGHT at Studio 52 and we're playing $25/$50+. This is one of the most unpredictable tables we've ever had. Featuring Lily Kiletto, Farah Galfond, Hayley Hanna, Christina 'BabyShark' Gollins, Aiza Sison & Lynn Banks! Commentary by Phil Galfond & Lon McEachern.
Video.title: Studio 52 - Episode 4 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Studio 52 - Episode 4 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 4 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 4 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: MJ Gonzales reads through the soul of a 3-barrel bluff. What else would you expect from Daniel Negreanu's poker coach? Episode 5 features special guest Cody Daniels making his poker night debut. Full Line up: Cody Daniels, MJ Gonzales, Johnnie Vibes, DJ Washburn, Adam Hendrix, Nicky Ringz & Danny Panagatos.
Video.title: Studio 52 - Episode 5 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Studio 52 - Episode 5 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 5 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 5 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: More $25/$50+ high stakes action from Studio 52 in Las Vegas. Lineup features MJ Gonzales, Adam Hendrix, Christian Soto, Jared Jaffee, Danny Panagatos & Mitchell Bank.
Video.title: Studio 52 - Episode 6 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Studio 52 - Episode 6 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 6 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 6 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Tensions rise on the felt as the poker action heats up in this wild $25/$50/$100 high stakes cash game from Studio 52 in Las Vegas. Lineup features Krissy Foxen, Christian Soto, Jared Jaffee, MJ Gonzales, Hayley Hanna & Christina McAlpin.
Video.title: Studio 52 - Episode 7 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Studio 52 - Episode 7 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 7 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 7 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: The established PROS received BAD intel on Keir Sullivan, not realizing they invited a SHARK to their game. Wild high stakes action $100/$200. Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.
Video.title: Studio 52 - Episode 8 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Studio 52 - Episode 8 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 8 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 8 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: If anyone can stop Keir Sullivan's winning streak, it's Shaun Deeb...right? Wild high stakes action $100/$200. Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.
Video.title: Studio 52 - Episode 9 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Studio 52 - Episode 9 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 9 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 9 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: More high stakes $100/$200/$400+ featuring Shaun Deeb and friends with commentary from comedian Joe Stapleton - Season 10 Episode 10 filmed in Las Vegas, NV (November 2023). Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

Studio 52 - Episode 10 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 10 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Table Finale of the $100/$200/$400 high stakes poker cash game featuring Shaun Deeb and friends with commentary from comedian Joe Stapleton - Season 10 Episode 11 filmed in Las Vegas, NV (November 2023). Lineup: Shaun Deeb, Ben Lamb, Keir Sullivan, MJ Gonzales, Shane Sigsbee, Craig Stackewicz, Clay Johnson. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

Studio 52 - Episode 11 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 11 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Can 9-time NHL All-Star Jeremy Roenick use his aggressive and competitive spirit to outwit a table full of poker sharks or will he be a fish out of water? Watch Jeremy at the Poker Night in America Studio 52 cash game with Jason Somerville, Scott Ball, Jeremiah Williams, Terrance Reid, Jesse Sylvia and Nick Marchington.
Video.title: Studio 52 - Episode 12 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Studio 52 - Episode 12 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 12 - Poker Night In America
Studio 52 - Episode 12 - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: Jeremy Roenick fights to survive against bad luck and nasty run outs ($25/$50/$100). Lineup: Jeremy Roenick, Jason Somerville, Scott Ball, TJ Reid, Jesse Sylvia, Nick Marchington, Jeremiah Williams. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.
Video.title: Studio 52 - Episode 13

Image.alt: Studio 52 - Episode 13

Video.summary: More from Studio 52 with Jeremy Roenick. ($25/$50/$100). Lineup: Jeremy Roenick, Jason Somerville, Scott Ball, TJ Reid, Jesse Sylvia, Nick Marchington, Jeremiah Williams. Commentary by Joe Stapleton.

Video.summary: $25/$50 with an optional straddle to $100/$200/$400+. Lineup features: Jason 'JCarver' Somerville, NHL Legend Jeremy Roenick, Scott Ball, Jesse Sylvia, Nick Marchington, Jeremiah Williams.

Video.summary: Hellmuth's Home Game from Grand Sierra Resort in Reno, Nevada. $25/$50 cash game action featuring Phil Hellmuth, Dan "Jungleman" Cates, Xuan Liu, Randy '3COIN' Sadler, DJ Washburn, Phillip Hellmuth III & Chris Nevada.
